# Claire Sersun Fitness

> Online strength coaching for women of all ages and abilities — including women over 40 and neurodivergent individuals. Personalized, sustainable training that builds lasting capability, confidence, and independence in your body.

Claire Sersun is an ACE Certified Personal Trainer, 500-Hour Comprehensive Pilates Instructor, and 200-Hour Registered Yoga Teacher with over a decade of movement-education experience. Coaching is delivered online and available worldwide.

## Services

- [Capable Body Coaching — 12-Week Strength Program](https://www.clairesersunfitness.com/coaching): Personalized coaching with custom workout programming, nutrition guidance, weekly check-ins, and 24/7 support. Designed to teach skills for independent, lifelong training.
- [Corporate & Executive Wellness](https://www.clairesersunfitness.com/corporate): Strength and wellness programs for teams and executives with demanding schedules.
- [Kilimanjaro Training Plan ($17)](https://www.clairesersunfitness.com/kilimanjaro-training-plan): A 6-month, strength-first blueprint (with a 12-week option) for hikers preparing to summit Mount Kilimanjaro. Instant PDF.
- [Resources](https://www.clairesersunfitness.com/resources): Training guides and digital products.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.clairesersunfitness.com/): Overview of coaching philosophy and approach.
- [About Claire](https://www.clairesersunfitness.com/about): Credentials, background, and coaching philosophy.
- [Blog](https://www.clairesersunfitness.com/blog): Evidence-based articles on strength training, movement, and building a capable life.
- [Contact](https://www.clairesersunfitness.com/contact): Coaching inquiries and application.

## Who it's for

Women of all ages and fitness levels — beginners, women over 40, and neurodivergent individuals who want personalized, sustainable strength training. Programs adapt to any equipment level, from a full gym to no equipment at all.
